header.subtitle: PARTNER ECOSYSTEM
header.title: Scale faster with our technology partner programs.
header.description: Whether you're a SaaS reseller, a systems integrator, or a technology consultant — partnering with Trai gives you access to battle-tested platforms, co-engineering support, and joint go-to-market strategies. Let's build together.

programs.title: Referral Partner Program
programs.desc: Refer clients who need custom software, cloud migrations, or AI solutions. Earn competitive commissions on every closed deal with zero overhead.
benefits: Revenue share on every referred project.
Dedicated partner portal with deal tracking.

programs.title: Reseller Partner Program
programs.desc: White-label and resell our enterprise platforms — CRM, ERP, and HRMS — under your own brand with full technical support from our engineering team.

programs.title: Technology Partner Program
programs.desc: Integrate your product with our platform ecosystem. Build joint solutions for shared enterprise clients and go to market together.
